items.title: 3 Stock Market Mistakes Investors Should Avoid in 2025
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: The article advises against making hasty investment decisions based on short-term market trends or political changes. It emphasizes the importance of maintaining a long-term investment strategy and avoiding the temptation to rotate in and out of sectors or companies that are temporarily underperforming.

items.title: 3 Portfolio Moves Stock Market Investors Should Make Before the End of the Year
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: The article discusses strategies for portfolio management, including maintaining an investment thesis, monitoring portfolio allocation, and setting savings goals. It highlights the importance of focusing on factors within your control, such as investing in quality companies and sticking with winning investments, to achieve long-term financial success.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Microsoft as an industry-leading company with exposure to various end markets, a strong balance sheet, and multiple levers for growing earnings, making it a worthwhile long-term investment.

The article uses Nvidia as an example of a stock that has significantly outperformed the market, demonstrating the importance of monitoring portfolio allocation and not selling winners just because they have appreciated in value.

The article mentions Meta Platforms as another stock that has performed well, though its percentage of the portfolio has not changed as much as Nvidia's due to the outsized gains of Nvidia and the broader market.
The article suggests the Vanguard Mega Cap Value ETF as a diversified option for investors looking to balance their portfolio's exposure to megacap, tech-focused growth companies.
